description_long: This is a round white ceramic plate with a black rim, holding a meal consisting of a hamburger with a sesame seed bun, a fried egg, lettuce, and tomato, accompanied by thick-cut potato wedges, a serving of coleslaw, and a piece of fried chicken or similar side. The hamburger is partially open, revealing its contents, and the food is arranged to cover most of the plate's surface. The plate itself is smooth and glossy, with no visible patterns or inscriptions. The food items are visually distinct, with the golden brown of the bun and potatoes, the creamy white of the coleslaw, and the green of the lettuce providing a colorful presentation. The plate appears clean and in good condition, suitable for serving a meal in a casual dining or urban outdoor setting.
description: A white ceramic plate with a black rim, topped with a hamburger, potato wedges, coleslaw, and a fried chicken piece. The meal is attractively arranged and the plate is clean and glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hamburger with a visible fried egg, potato wedges, coleslaw, and a piece of fried chicken on a white plate with a black rim.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the hamburger bun and more potato wedges, with less visibility of the coleslaw and fried chicken.
description_view_2: Side view with the hamburger bun lifted, exposing the fried egg, patty, and lettuce, and a clear view of the potato wedges and coleslaw.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the open hamburger, fried egg, and a balanced display of all side items on the plate.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is shown with food items arranged on its surface, implying use in a dining or serving context.
